title: FLASHBACK — Dad enters cafe, sees Mom reading at corner table
prompt: @young_Papa enters the warm-wood European cafe through the door, brass pendants overhead, marble tables. @young_Mama sitting at the corner window table reading a paperback, coffee mug beside the book. Eyes STAY on the page, mouth softens. From the doorway, stops mid-step, head TURNS toward the corner, mouth FALLS slightly open, soft warm smile. Starts walking toward the corner table. young_Papa (gentle surprise): "Oh... hi."
